mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (openid, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time) VALUES (#{openid}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select DATE(create_time) as date, count(*) as newUserCount, (select count(*) from user where create_time <= DATE_ADD(DATE(u.create_time), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) as totalUserCount from user u where create_time >= #{begin} and create_time <= #{end} group by DATE(create_time) order by DATE(create_time)
